criterion_excerpt: Category 2: Bundle Size. Measure the PRODUCTION FRONTEND bundle for the web app in this monorepo. Spec improvement target: 15% reduction in total production bundle size, OR code splitting that reduces the initial-load (entry) bundle by 20%. Build the production frontend and measu

result.method: Replayed the cohort yardstick (cat-2-bundle): clean `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`, then production build via repo's own `pnpm run build:web` (tsc + vite 6.4.1/Rollup). Measured dist output at web/dist using find -printf '%s' sums, du -sh, and stat; identified initial-load (entry) assets authoritatively from generated dist/index.html (module script + modulepreload links + stylesheet); computed gzip with gzip -9.
result.method_rationale: The criterion asks for production frontend bundle sizes from the repo's real build. The repo is a pnpm monorepo with a dedicated build:web script (tsc + vite). Using the toolchain's own output and deterministic file-size/gzip counters is the authoritative instrument, matching the frozen cohort yardstick. index.html is the ground truth for what loads on first paint.
result.what_would_raise_confidence: A reproducible baseline (pre-change) build in the clone would let me independently verify the claimed −84% initial-JS and −30%/−15% total reductions; currently only the 'after' state is measurable (single git commit). Cohort-wide standardization of 'total bundle' (apparent find-sum vs du-block vs JS+CSS only) and 'initial load' (JS-only vs JS+CSS) would remove remaining definitional ambiguity.
result.self_report_comparison: Matches team's headline 'after' numbers: initial JS 92.90 KB gzip ≈ my 93.0 KB gzip (within gzip-version noise); total dist 3.0 MB ≈ my du -sh block measure (3.0 MB). Caveat: true apparent content size is ~2.04 MB; the 3.0 MB figure is inflated by filesystem block allocation across 320 files (many tiny SVG/icon chunks). The team's claimed baseline (589 KB / 4.3 MB) and reduction percentages (−84% / −30%) could NOT be reproduced — the clone has a single commit with no pre-change build, so those are unverified.
result.qualitative_judgment: Judgment: code splitting is genuinely implemented and effective — only 3 of 310 JS chunks load initially (entry + 2 modulepreloaded vendor chunks = 93 KB gzip), with the bulk of JS (1.83 MiB total) deferred into route/feature lazy chunks. The 'code splitting reduces initial-load' arm of the spec target is clearly satisfied by the current architecture, independent of the unverifiable baseline percentage.
result.held_loosely: Next time, a frozen cohort standard for 'total bundle' (recommend apparent find-sum, not du block-size, since block inflation varies with chunk count) and 'initial load' (JS-only vs JS+CSS) should be pinned. Also, capturing a baseline build artifact or commit in each clone would let reduction percentages be verified rather than taken on the team's markdown.
result.commands_summary: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; pnpm run build:web; find web/dist -type f -printf '%s\n'|awk sum; du -sh / du -s --apparent-size web/dist; find web/dist -name '*.js'/-name '*.css' size sums; grep -oE '/assets/[^\"]+\\.(js|css)' web/dist/index.html; stat -c%s + gzip -9 -c|wc -c on entry/modulepreload/css files; find web/dist/assets -name '*.js'|wc -l.

# Reject packages published less than 7 days ago to mitigate supply chain attacks.
# Applies to all dependencies including transitive ones.

# Category 2: Bundle Size

> **Status:** ✅ Complete — Last updated: 2026-05-22

## Executive Summary

This audit measured the size of JavaScript delivered to users on first page load and the total production build output. The baseline shipped a single 589 KB gzip JavaScript chunk to every visitor — including users who only needed a login page. Through route-level code splitting, vendor chunk separation, lazy-loaded heavy dependencies, and removal of a production devtools leak, the initial JS payload dropped to 92.90 KB gzip — an 84% reduction that exceeds the GFA 20% target by a wide margin. Both GFA targets are met: initial JS payload is 92.90 KB gzip (−84% vs 589 KB baseline) and total `dist/` is 3.0 MB (−30% vs 4.3 MB baseline, below the 3.65 MB target). The 4.1 MB figure from the mid-pass audit snapshot included the 735 KB `stats.html` treemap artifact before it was made opt-in.

### GFA Scorecard

| Metric | GFA Required | Baseline | Current | Status |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Initial JS (HTML-preloaded, gzip) | ≤ 471 KB (−20%) | 589 KB | 92.90 KB | ✅ |
| Total `dist/` size | ≤ 3.65 MB (−15%) | 4.3 MB | 3.0 MB | ✅ |
| ReactQueryDevtools in production | Removed | Yes | No (dev-only) | ✅ |
| Route-level code splitting | Implemented | None | 15 routes lazy | ✅ |
| Unused dependency removed | Removed | `query-sync-storage-persister` | Removed | ✅ |

## Findings

| ID | Finding | Severity | Status | Fixed In |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| F-1 | No route-level code splitting — all pages in one 589 KB chunk | Critical | Fixed | Pass 1 — 2026-05-22 |
| F-2 | TipTap/Yjs editor loaded on every page (not just document pages) | High | Fixed | Pass 1 — 2026-05-22 |
| F-3 | TanStack Query DevTools in production bundle | High | Fixed | Pass 1 — 2026-05-22 |
| F-4 | Emoji picker (72 KB gzip) loaded on every page | High | Fixed | Pass 1 — 2026-05-22 |
| F-5 | `@tanstack/query-sync-storage-persister` unused dependency | Medium | Fixed | Pass 1 — 2026-05-22 |
| F-6 | `diff-match-patch` in sidebars (not lazy) | Medium | Fixed | Pass 3 — 2026-05-22 |
| F-7 | `tippy.js` in `vendor-ui` (every auth page) instead of `vendor-editor` | Medium | Fixed | Pass 4 — 2026-05-22 |
| F-8 | `@dnd-kit` loaded with IssuesList (not just kanban view) | Medium | Fixed | Pass 4 — 2026-05-22 |
| F-9 | Total `dist/` size measured at 4.1 MB mid-pass (included `stats.html` artifact) | Low | Fixed | Pass 1 — 2026-05-22 |

## Remediation History

### Pass 1 — 2026-05-22

- Converted all top-level page imports in `web/src/main.tsx` to `React.lazy` behind a shared `Suspense` fallback (15 routes).
- Moved React Query Devtools behind `import.meta.env.DEV` and a dynamic import so it is absent from production builds.
- Added Vite `manualChunks` for React/router, TanStack Query, UI, and editor/Yjs/TipTap dependencies.
- Removed unused `@tanstack/query-sync-storage-persister` from `web/package.json` and `pnpm-lock.yaml`.
- Replaced `lowlight(common)` with 12 explicitly registered `highlight.js` languages used by the app.
- Replaced `emoji-picker-react` with a small local project-icon picker, removing the 72 KB gzip third-party emoji catalog.
- Made `rollup-plugin-visualizer` opt-in with `ANALYZE_BUNDLE=true` so the 735 KB `stats.html` artifact is not emitted in normal production builds.

### Pass 2 — 2026-05-22

- Changed the Inter font link in `web/index.html` from render-blocking `rel="stylesheet"` to `rel="preload" as="style"` with the `onload` swap trick; added `<noscript>` fallback.
- Added `<link rel="dns-prefetch">` for the Elastic Beanstalk API host in `web/index.html`.
- Added idle prefetch for Dashboard and Issues route chunks via `requestIdleCallback` in `web/src/main.tsx` (Safari fallback: 2-second `setTimeout`).
- Trimmed highlight.js language set from 12 to 8 (removed `diff`, `markdown`, `plaintext`, `shell`; aliased `shell` → `bash`).

### Pass 3 — 2026-05-22

- Made `DiffViewer` a `React.lazy` import in `web/src/components/ApprovalButton.tsx`; extracted `tipTapToPlainText` into `web/src/lib/tipTapToPlainText.ts` to avoid pulling `diff-match-patch` (18 KB gzip) into the sidebar chunk.
- Added `@tiptap/extension-code-block-lowlight` to the `vendor-editor` `manualChunks` list in `web/vite.config.ts` (was missing, causing Rollup to bundle it with `UnifiedDocumentPage`).

### Pass 4 — 2026-05-22

- Moved `tippy.js` from `vendor-ui` to `vendor-editor` in `web/vite.config.ts`; `vendor-ui` dropped from 41.44 KB → 29.34 KB gzip (−12.10 KB / −29%) on every authenticated page.
- Changed `KanbanBoard` import in `web/src/components/IssuesList.tsx` to `React.lazy` + `Suspense`; `@dnd-kit` (19.72 KB gzip) is now loaded on-demand only when the user switches to kanban view.

## Open Items

*(None — all findings resolved.)*

---

## Methodology

Build tool: Vite 6.4.1 with Rollup. Build command: `pnpm build:shared && pnpm --filter @ship/web build`. Bundle analysis: `rollup-plugin-visualizer` 7.0.1 treemap (`web/dist/stats.html`, gzip and brotli sizes enabled) — triggered with `ANALYZE_BUNDLE=true pnpm build:web`. Unused dependencies identified by cross-referencing `web/package.json` against `grep -r` over `web/src/`. Initial JS payload measured as the sum of `<link rel="modulepreload">` entries emitted in the built `index.html`. Total `dist/` size measured with `du -sh web/dist/`.

Visualizer configuration in `web/vite.config.ts`:
```typescript
visualizer({ filename: 'dist/stats.html', gzipSize: true, brotliSize: true, template: 'treemap' })
```

## Technical Appendix

### Baseline chunk inventory

**Main chunk (589 KB gzip / 2,024 KB uncompressed):**
`dist/assets/index-C2vAyoQ1.js` — 2,073,698 bytes uncompressed / 589 KB gzip. This single chunk contained the entire application: all React components, all routes, all editor logic, all utility libraries. Vite's default 500 KB warning threshold — main chunk was 4× over.

**Split chunks present at baseline (tab components only):**

| Chunk | Raw | Gzip | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `ProgramWeeksTab-*.js` | 16.8 KB | 5.5 KB | Program weeks tab |
| `WeekReviewTab-*.js` | 12.6 KB | 3.7 KB | Week review tab |
| `StandupFeed-*.js` | 9.7 KB | 2.9 KB | Standup feed |
| `ProjectRetroTab-*.js` | 9.0 KB | 2.4 KB | Project retro tab |
| `ProjectWeeksTab-*.js` | 6.7 KB | 2.3 KB | Project weeks tab |
| `ProgramProjectsTab-*.js` | 4.4 KB | 1.6 KB | Program projects tab |
| `WeekPlanningTab-*.js` | 3.0 KB | 1.5 KB | Week planning tab |
| `ProjectDetailsTab-*.js` | 3.6 KB | 1.5 KB | Project details tab |
| `WeekOverviewTab-*.js` | 1.9 KB | 0.9 KB | Week overview tab |
| `ProgramOverviewTab-*.js` | 1.7 KB | 0.8 KB | Program overview tab |
| `WeekIssuesTab-*.js` | 1.3 KB | 0.8 KB | Week issues tab |
| *(many SVG icon chunks)* | 0.7–1.8 KB each | — | USWDS icon components from `import.meta.glob` |

All top-level pages (Dashboard, Issues, Documents, My Week, Sprint Board, Programs, Projects, Team Directory) were statically imported into the main chunk at baseline.

### Dependency weight analysis (from `rollup-plugin-visualizer`, baseline)

Actual gzip sizes per package extracted from `dist/stats.html` treemap (individual module gzip sums exceed the final bundle gzip of 589 KB because bundling achieves additional compression):

**App source:**
| Category | Gzip (KB) | Notes |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `web/src/` | **295 KB** | All application code — components, pages, hooks |

**Top third-party dependencies:**
| Rank | Package | Gzip (KB) | Notes |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 1 | `highlight.js` | **118 KB** | Pulled in by `lowlight` → `@tiptap/extension-code-block-lowlight`; used the `lowlight` common language set |
| 2 | `emoji-picker-react` | **72 KB** | Full emoji picker — loaded on every page |
| 3 | `@uswds/uswds` | **72 KB** | USWDS icon package impact via lazy SVG glob |
| 4 | `prosemirror-view` | **57 KB** | ProseMirror rendering engine (TipTap dependency) |
| 5 | `yjs` | **55 KB** | CRDT engine — loaded on every page, only needed in editor |
| 6 | `react-dom` | **42 KB** | Non-negotiable |
